# .NET Version Upgrade Progress

## Overview

Upgrade `OnlyM.sln` from `.NET 9` to `.NET 10` using a dependency-first execution order. The work proceeds from foundational libraries to applications and then test projects, with package compatibility updates and validation builds/tests applied across in-scope .NET projects.

**Progress**: 4/4 tasks complete (100%) ![100%](https://progress-bar.xyz/100)

## Tasks

- ✅ 01-upgrade-foundation-projects
- ✅ 02-upgrade-shared-and-dependent-libraries
- ✅ 03-upgrade-main-app-and-core-tests
- ✅ 04-upgrade-remaining-test-projects-and-validate
